title: THE 2PM CLUB Daytime Disco Bedford: Christmas Special
description: Festive 2PM CLUB - daytime dancefloor, home in time for tree lights.
subtitle: The ULTIMATE Christmas Daytime Disco - Wall‑to‑wall 80s, 90s & 00s anthems with festive classics from Mariah, Wham! Slade & co.
fullDescription:
Your Christmas Party just got upgraded... to the afternoon! No more yawning through midnight office do's. From 2PM sharp, we're upgrading your December with neon fairy lights, and wall‑shaking 80s, 90s & 00s anthems - spiked with the festive bangers you've been miming in the car since November.

Your best night out is NOW in the afternoon. By 7 PM, you'll be back on the sofa for Strictly, glowing like Rudolph with your voice happily gone. It's all the festive fun with your mates, none of the Sunday regret.
highlights: 🎄 Festive Floor‑Fillers: Mariah, Wham!, Slade & Shakin' Stevens - loud and proud.|🎤 Iconic Throwbacks: The 80s, 90s & 00s choruses you still know every word to!|🕑 The 8pm Win: Full night out experience, home for a takeaway. No Sunday Regrets 😇|👯‍♀️ Group‑Chat Hero: Easy option for all, Christmas reunion sorted.

title: THE 2PM CLUB Daytime Disco Luton
description: THE 2PM CLUB Luton - 4 hours of iconic 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. All the fun of a proper night out, home by 7-ish.
subtitle: Your best night out, right in the middle of the afternoon. 4 hours of 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. Home by 7-ish. Let your hair down. Properly!
fullDescription:
LET YOUR HAIR DOWN. THIS SATURDAY! 🎉

Only 25 tickets left for this Saturday's Daytime Disco in Luton!

Remember when going OUT OUT didn't require a week's recovery? When you could sing every word, lose your voice, and still feel human the next day?

The 2PM Club is the night out that never gets cancelled. No more 47-message group chats. No more "maybe next time." Everyone says yes to this one.

This Saturday. 2pm. The Hat Factory, Luton. Don't miss it!
highlights: 🎤 ICONIC ANTHEMS. NONSTOP ENERGY: Wall-to-wall 80s, 90s and 00s. Belting out lyrics with other people who know every word too. That moment when the whole room feels like family – that's what you're booking.|🕺 DAYTIME PARTY, NIGHT-OUT VIBES: Same Boombastic team, Club-level production and confetti moments – just at people-friendly hours. Dance freely, laugh loudly, and still be home by 7pm.|👯 THE 'NIGHT OUT' EVERYONE SAYS YES TO: No more 47-message threads. No more "maybe next time." Four hours where everyone actually makes it.|😎 NO SUNDAY REGRETS - JUST A GLOW: Perfect Sunday! You'll still be buzzing after a full night's sleep. A hoarse voice from belting out all the bangers is the only hangover we're talking about. Get all the buzz of a massive night out, but wake up fresh.|🏆 TRUST THE LEGACY: Created by Boombastic Events – 10+ years of consistent sell-outs across the UK because we know how to create moments that matter.

title: THE 2PM CLUB Daytime Disco Northampton
description: THIS SATURDAY. 10 TICKETS LEFT. Back at the home of Northampton Saints for an afternoon of iconic 80s 90s and 00s anthems after our October sellout.
subtitle: This Saturday. 10 tickets left. Your best night out, right in the middle of the afternoon.
fullDescription:
THIS SATURDAY. 10 TICKETS LEFT. DON'T MISS THIS ONE 🎟️

LET YOUR HAIR DOWN. WITHOUT THE NEXT-DAY REGRETS ✨

Remember when going OUT OUT didn't require a week's recovery? When you could sing every word, lose your voice, and still feel human the next day?

We've found the way to make that happen once more!

This Saturday, after our sellout visit in October, we're back at the home of Northampton Saints for an afternoon of iconic 80s 90s and 00s anthems!

4 hours of the biggest hairbrush hits and sing-alongs, with night out energy, confetti moments, and a room full of people who know every word too.

Last time sold out. With only 10 tickets left for this Saturday, this one will too. Book yours before the group chat catches up.
highlights: 🎤 ICONIC ANTHEMS. NONSTOP ENERGY: Wall-to-wall classics from Wham! to Whitney, Bon Jovi to Beyoncé. You WILL do the moves. You WILL lose your voice. You WILL text each other about it for weeks.|🕺 DAYTIME PARTY, NIGHT-OUT VIBES: Same Boombastic team. Club-level production, massive screens, dazzling lights, and confetti explosions - just at people-friendly hours. Dance freely, laugh loudly, and still be home by 7pm.|👯 FINALLY, A PLAN NOBODY BAILS ON: This is the plan that will escape the group chat. Four hours where everyone actually makes it - no babysitter dramas, no late-night worries. Adulting can wait.|😎 ALL THE FUN. STILL BUZZING BY WEDNESDAY: Last time, you walked out saying "Let's do it again!" This is the time to do it. This is your plan.|🏆 TRUST THE LEGACY: Created by Boombastic Events - 10+ years of consistent sell-outs across the Midlands, including previous smash-hit events right here at Franklin's Gardens.
legacyLine: Sold out at Franklin's Gardens last October.

title: THE 2PM CLUB Daytime Disco: 80s Edition Northampton
description: THE 2PM CLUB goes full-on 80s at The Picturedrome, Northampton. Your best 80s night out. In the middle of the afternoon.
subtitle: Your best 80s night out. In the middle of the afternoon.
heroSubtitle: Your best 80s night out. In the middle of the afternoon.
musicDescription: 80s-only anthems: Madonna, Michael Jackson, Wham!, Whitney, Prince, Bon Jovi, Duran Duran, A-ha, Tina Turner and the songs the whole room comes in on.
soundtrackLine: Madonna. Michael Jackson. Wham! Whitney. Prince. Bon Jovi. Duran Duran. A-ha. Tina Turner.
fullDescription:
THE 2PM CLUB goes full-on 80s for one afternoon only.

We are back at The Picturedrome on Sat 25th July, 2pm-6pm, and this time the whole dancefloor is 80s from start to finish.

Expect Madonna, Michael Jackson, Wham!, Whitney Houston, Bon Jovi, Prince, Duran Duran, A-ha, The Human League, Tina Turner, George Michael, Cyndi Lauper, Eurythmics, Culture Club, Tears For Fears and Simple Minds.

Same great 2PM Club format: doors at 2pm, four hours of big choruses, confetti moments and a room full of people who know every word. Home by 7 if you want to be.
highlights: 🎤 80S ONLY. WALL-TO-WALL: Madonna, Michael Jackson, Wham!, Whitney, Prince, Bon Jovi, Duran Duran, A-ha, Tina Turner and the songs everyone knows.|🕺 SAME 2PM CLUB FORMAT: Four hours of night-out energy in the afternoon. Big choruses, home by 7-ish.|💬 "IT FELT LIKE 2AM NOT 2PM!": A real review from a real Saturday. That's the room you're walking into.|😎 NO SUNDAY REGRETS: A proper dance, your evening still intact, and Sunday not written off.|🏆 THE PICTUREDROME, NORTHAMPTON: Back in a room that knows exactly how THE 2PM CLUB should feel.
urgencyLabel: 80S EDITION - EARLY RELEASE NOW ON SALE
legacyLine: One afternoon only: 80s from start to finish.

title: THE 2PM CLUB Daytime Disco: 80s Edition Bedford
description: THE 2PM CLUB goes full-on 80s at Bedford Esquires. Your best 80s night out. In the middle of the afternoon.
subtitle: Your best 80s night out. In the middle of the afternoon.
heroSubtitle: Your best 80s night out. In the middle of the afternoon.
musicDescription: 80s-only anthems: Madonna, Michael Jackson, Wham!, Whitney, Prince, Bon Jovi, Duran Duran, A-ha, Tina Turner and the songs the whole room comes in on.
soundtrackLine: Madonna. Michael Jackson. Wham! Whitney. Prince. Bon Jovi. Duran Duran. A-ha. Tina Turner.
fullDescription:
THE 2PM CLUB Daytime Disco is back at Bedford Esquires on Sat 12th September, 2pm-6pm. We’ve been packing this place out for a while now. This one’s different: for one afternoon, every song is 80s.

EXPECT TO HEAR

Madonna · Michael Jackson · Wham! · Whitney Houston · Bon Jovi · Prince · Duran Duran · A-ha · The Human League · Tina Turner · George Michael · Cyndi Lauper · Eurythmics · Culture Club · Tears For Fears · Simple Minds

The ones everyone knows. The ones where the room comes in before the chorus has properly started.

HOW IT WORKS

Doors at 2pm. Four hours of 80s anthems back to back, with your people.

Home by 7 if you want to be. Pub, food or sofa after if the afternoon does what it usually does.

WHAT PEOPLE SAY

“It felt like 2am not 2pm!”

“Absolutely fantastic afternoon out. Great music, fab people and a really safe environment”

“Great music, great atmosphere everyone was happy & friendly & we still had the evening to carry on!!”

That is the point: a proper night-out feeling, just at a time that works.

THE DETAILS

Bedford Esquires, Bedford
Sat 12th September 2026
2pm-6pm
Over 18s only

FAQs

Is this different to the normal 2PM Club?
Yes. Same daytime disco format, but this date is 80s-only for one afternoon.

Is it fancy dress?
Come as dressed-up or dressed-down as you like. The 80s are in the music, not a costume requirement.

What time does it finish?
Last song is 6pm. Plenty of time to go for food, carry on somewhere else, or be home by 7.

Who is it for?
Grown-ups who want a proper Saturday dance without giving Sunday away.

Are tickets refundable?
Tickets are non-refundable unless the event is cancelled.

Send it to the group chat and get it booked.
highlights: 🎤 EXPECT TO HEAR: Madonna, Michael Jackson, Wham!, Whitney Houston, Bon Jovi, Prince, Duran Duran, A-ha, The Human League, Tina Turner, George Michael, Cyndi Lauper, Eurythmics, Culture Club, Tears For Fears and Simple Minds.|🕺 HOW IT WORKS: Doors at 2pm. Four hours of 80s anthems back to back, with your people.|🏠 HOME BY 7 IF YOU WANT TO BE: Pub, food or sofa after if the afternoon does what it usually does.|💬 WHAT PEOPLE SAY: “It felt like 2am not 2pm!” A proper night-out feeling, just at a time that works.|🏆 BEDFORD ESQUIRES: THE 2PM CLUB goes full-on 80s in a room that already knows the afternoon-disco magic.
urgencyLabel: 80S EDITION - EARLY RELEASE NOW ON SALE
legacyLine: One afternoon only: 80s from start to finish.

description: THE 2PM CLUB goes full-on 80s at Hat Factory, Luton. Your best 80s night out. In the middle of the afternoon.
subtitle: Your best 80s night out. In the middle of the afternoon.
heroSubtitle: Your best 80s night out. In the middle of the afternoon.
musicDescription: 80s-only anthems: Madonna, Michael Jackson, Wham!, Whitney, Prince, Bon Jovi, Duran Duran, A-ha, Tina Turner and the songs the whole room comes in on.
soundtrackLine: Madonna. Michael Jackson. Wham! Whitney. Prince. Bon Jovi. Duran Duran. A-ha. Tina Turner.
fullDescription:
THE 2PM CLUB Daytime Disco is back at Hat Factory on Saturday 3rd October, 2pm-6pm. This one is different: for one afternoon, every song is 80s.

EXPECT TO HEAR

Madonna, Michael Jackson, Wham!, Whitney Houston, Bon Jovi, Prince, Duran Duran, A-ha, The Human League, Tina Turner, George Michael, Cyndi Lauper, Eurythmics, Culture Club, Tears For Fears and Simple Minds.

The ones everyone knows. The ones where the room comes in before the chorus has properly started.

HOW IT WORKS

Doors at 2pm. Four hours of 80s anthems back to back, with your people.

Home by 7 if you want to be. Pub, food or sofa after if the afternoon does what it usually does.

WHAT PEOPLE SAY

"It felt like 2am not 2pm!"

"Absolutely fantastic afternoon out. Great music, fab people and a really safe environment"

"Great music, great atmosphere everyone was happy and friendly and we still had the evening to carry on!!"

That is the point: a proper night-out feeling, just at a time that works.

THE DETAILS

Hat Factory Arts Centre, Luton
Saturday 3rd October 2026
2pm-6pm
Over 18s only

FAQs

Is this different to the normal 2PM Club?
Yes. Same daytime disco format, but this date is 80s-only for one afternoon.

Is it fancy dress?
Come as dressed-up or dressed-down as you like. The 80s are in the music, not a costume requirement.

What time does it finish?
Last song is 6pm. Plenty of time to go for food, carry on somewhere else, or be home by 7.

Who is it for?
Grown-ups who want a proper Saturday dance without giving Sunday away.

Are tickets refundable?
Tickets are non-refundable unless the event is cancelled.

Send it to the group chat and get it booked.
